narrative:
Barberton City Sd city school district has 15,040 registered voters, with 60.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 10.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 29.0%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 18.3 percentage points. Registration is trending redder in younger age cohorts (1990s–2000s births lean +7.6% D−R vs +23.2% for 1950s–60s cohorts).
